description_short: Parses and aggregates firewall logs for statistical analysis.
description_long: Ingests firewall logs (syslog, CSV, JSON) from vendors including Palo Alto, Fortinet, pfSense, iptables, and Windows Firewall. Aggregates traffic by source/destination, port, action (allow/deny), and time window. Produces top-talker summaries, deny hotspots, and port-scan indicators to feed into threat hunt workflows.
author: Event Mill Contributors
